documentation_gates.notes: Closeout docs, tracked state, runtime, and PR evidence ownership are locked through the shared matrix.
Promotion checklist and tracked evidence ledger are now part of the workflow-v2 docs bundle.

operational_gates.notes: High-risk and anchor-extension slices still end with manual merge handoff.
Live smoke entrypoints exist, but the standard is still on-demand rather than a locked recurring lane.
Scheduler tooling exists, but the operating standard is still macOS launchd-first.

pilot_lanes.label: Authority-required UI lane
pilot_lanes.notes: Use slice06 (`06-recipe-to-planner`) as the authority-required canary and record Stage 2/4/6 checkpoint outcomes here.

pilot_lanes.label: External smoke lane
pilot_lanes.notes: Need one pilot where source PR Actual Verification and closeout preflight reuse the same live smoke evidence.

pilot_lanes.label: Bugfix patch lane
pilot_lanes.notes: Need one small bugfix/post-merge patch lane to compare lead time and blocked retry behavior against v1.

blockers: manual handoff, live smoke, and scheduler standards are still partial
promotion_gate.next_review_trigger: After slice06 Stage 4 checkpoint and one external-smoke pilot.
promotion_gate.notes: Stay in promotion-candidate mode until the required pilot lanes and operational standards pass.
